title: BBC's Gaza documentary narrated by Hamas official's son breaches editorial guidelines, report finds
snippet: While the BBC declared the documentary an "important record," but by failing to disclose the narrator's connection to Hamas, it breached editorial guidelines on accuracy.
title_he: BBC's Gaza documentary narrated by Hamas official's son breaches editorial guidelines, report finds
snippet_he: While the BBC declared the documentary an "important record," but by failing to disclose the narrator's connection to Hamas, it breached editorial guidelines on accuracy.
